statement: Relay prompt spec written verbatim to prompt_spec_used.md for AEAL provenance.

All bibkeys required for Phase 2 (BirkhoffTrjitzinsky1933, Wasow1965, Adams1928, Costin2008, Immink1984, Turrittin1955, LodayRichaud2016) already exist in bibliography_pass1.bib; no new bibkey introduced; no collision detected.

At d=2, alpha-direction (deg a=1, deg b=2): Wimp-Zeilberger naive Newton-polygon balance yields mu_dom=2, mu_sub=-1, A_naive=3. Recovers PCF-1 v1.3 Section 6 Theorem 5 LOWER branch (QL01-QL26 with A=3); does NOT recover V_quad upper branch (A=4=2d).

At d=3, alpha-direction (deg a=2, deg b=3): A_naive = 4 = d+1. Empirical PCF-2 v1.3 R1.1+R1.3+Q1: A_fit ~ 6 = 2d. DRIFT by 2 — SIARC stratum at d>=3 sits at borderline / exceptional locus where naive normal-case formula does not apply.

At d=4, alpha-direction (deg a=3, deg b=4): A_naive = 5 = d+1. Empirical PCF-2 v1.3: A_fit ~ 7.954 ~ 8 = 2d (60/60 quartic families, sigma=3.7e-3). DRIFT by ~3 — confirms SIARC stratum at d>=3 is at borderline / exceptional locus.

Phase B sweep at d=3 across three conventions (alpha/symmetric/delta): A_naive in {2,3,4}; borderline condition deg_a=2*deg_b NEVER met for any convention; non-resonance (mu differences not in Z) FAILS GENERICALLY.
Phase B at d=4: A_naive in {3,4,5}; borderline NEVER met. Same structural finding as d=3.

Phase B sweep extended to d in [5,8]: same structural pattern. A_naive = d+1 (alpha-direction), d (symmetric), d-1 (delta-direction). Empirical / B4 target A=2d never recovered by naive Newton-polygon analysis. Confirms SIARC stratum is in NORMAL case (deg_a < 2*deg_b) but exhibits BORDERLINE-case asymptotic A.
Non-degeneracy condition (leading polynomial coefficient c_b != 0) holds across d in [3,8] for all three conventions, by construction of the SIARC stratum.

B-T 1933 sections 7-9 located in OCR text dump at lines 1686 (Theorem II), 2249 (Lemma 10 / Sec 8), 2700 (Fundamental Theorem / Sec 9), 2692 (Theorem III converse / Sec 11). All extracted verbatim into phase_c_literature_verification.md.

B-T 1933 Section 7 Theorem II (page 51-52, OCR L1686-1730) extracted verbatim. Hypothesis: set Q_1...Q_n has 'point of division' in (1)+...+(m); Re Q_tau > Re Q_{r+nu}; coefficients 'of the right kind' per Section 1; factorization L_n = L_{n-r} L_r per Lemma 9. Conclusion: if L_{n-r}, L_r completely proper then L_n completely proper.

B-T 1933 Section 9 Fundamental Theorem (page 69, OCR L2700-2705) extracted verbatim: 'Every equation L_n(y)=0 ... with coefficients of the kind specified in Section 1 and known in the complete neighborhood of infinity, is completely proper in each of the several quadrants associated with the equation.' Universal in d (polynomial degree) and n (recurrence order).

B-T 1933 Section 11 Theorem III converse (page 82, OCR L2692-2705) extracted verbatim: given a linearly independent set of formal series e^{Q_j(x)} s_j(x) with consecutive regions R_s and connection matrices p^{s,s+1}_ij of period 1, there exists a difference equation L_n(y)=0 with coefficients of Section 1-type, possessing the formal series as fundamental solutions in each region.

Phase C four sub-gates: C.2.1 (non-resonance match): STRUCTURAL MATCH at non-borderline, CAVEAT at borderline; C.2.2 (non-degeneracy match): MATCH; C.2.3 (d-range applicability): MATCH (B-T Fundamental Theorem universal in d); C.2.4 (mu-units consistency per A-01): CONFIRMED. No HALT_T1P2_NONRESONANCE_MISMATCH or HALT_T1P2_NONDEGENERACY_MISMATCH or HALT_T1P2_LITERATURE_DISAGREES_WITH_012 triggered.

Verdict: UPGRADE_PARTIAL_FORMAL_LEVEL. Phase A+B establish formal Newton-polygon baseline A_naive <= d+1; Phase C confirms B-T 1933 Sec 7-9 existence/factorization machinery applies to SIARC stratum. The lift to A=2d at d>=3 requires identification (P2.1+P2.2) of SIARC stratum as borderline/exceptional locus + sectorial upgrade (P2.3) via Wasow Sec X.3 (Theorem 11.1) / Adams 1928 / Turrittin 1955 / Immink 1984. Wasow image-only on disk; Adams NIA per A-01; Turrittin/Immink not acquired. Closure deferred to T1 Phase 3.

M4 stays partial (EMPIRICAL d=3,4 + LIT BRACKET A in [d, 2d] + FORMAL BASELINE A_naive <= d+1 + STRUCTURAL FRAMING of P2.1+P2.2+P2.3 lift). M9 gating remains {M4-partial, M6}. H1 retains PHASE_2_GATED label (Phase 2 produces baseline + structural framing, not closure). v1.15 picture H1 label is correct and retained.
